profile.description: High-end athleisure made to go straight from the office to yoga class.
The Dawiva marketplace connects local, organic, and sustainable agriculture to eco-conscious consumers and high end eateries.

Emerald Seas sends travel enthusiasts on curated trips to exotic destinations, focusing on the "local" feel for each place through small boutique hotels and inns, favorite restaurants and cafés, and hyper-local one-of-a-kind experiences.

EverChat builds white-labeled messaging apps, stacks, and platforms for worldwide organizations and brands to build their own branded social network. Our keystone clients include JP Morgan Chase Bank, American Express, Boeing, and InterContinental Hotels Group.

Harmony Circle has the number one rated app in the Apple® App Store to promote spiritual and meditation studios to open a robust network of small businesses to a younger, more tech-savvy audience through social networks, social deals, and public reviews and ratings.

HeartSpan builds innovative health monitoring devices for at-risk populations, including seniors and children, to monitor long-term trends in basic metrics such as heart rate, pulse, glucose levels, and more.

IMIM is a cross-platform mobile messaging app        for iPhone, Android, Windows Phone, and BlackBerry. IMIM allows more        than 5,000,000 users in 26 countries to share messages, audio,        and video without an SMS plan. The company was founded by Emily        Wilson and Billy Johnson in 2012.

The Last Word provides connects disputing parties with state-licensed arbitrators to perform on-demand binding arbitration through standardized contracts and video conferencing to provide 24-hour turn around on arbitration disputes between two or more parties.

Meetly makes online appointment scheduling software for businesses of any size. Our cloud-based scheduling solution requires no software installation, and offers free apps for iPhone, iPad, and Android. 

Meetly is on a mission to transform the way people meet and make appointments. The company was founded by Emily Wilson and Billy Johnson in 2012.

profile.description: Red Suns connects world travelers and speciality foreign destinations, providing support for travel booking, concierge services, language translations, and Visa assistance.

profile.description: Speedster, Inc. links the multi-billion dollar used car industry to peer-reviewed mechanics to perform vehicle rehabilitation, inspections, and escrow services to facilitate secure car sales between private parties.

Star Space engages teachers, students, and parents in innovative online games to crowd source discovery of stars, comets, and asteroids while encouraging engagement with NASA and other astronomy organizations.

profile.address: 10 Paternoster Row, London EC4M 7LS, United Kingdom
profile.description: ThemeBuilder is the leading themes marketplace for WordPress, Bootstrap, Drupal, and many other frameworks. Users can download professionally designed themes starting at just £3 to give their sites a custom look and feel. The company was founded by Emily Wilson in 2012.

Wallet Guard helps educate and teach consumers about their spending habits and, through financial rewards and gamification, rewards savings and thriftier spending behaviors, leading to lower debt and higher savings.

Wing Span is an on-demand service that provides hang gliders, paragliders, sky diving, kite surfing, training, certification, and more to the rapidly expanding market of aeronautical sport enthusiasts.
ZenPaper Ltd is the premier paper company of the United Kingdom.
